import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None
def test_hanoi_reveals_bug():
    """hanoi(2, start=1, end=3) should return [(1,2),(1,3),(2,3)].
    The buggy code appends (start, helper) instead of (start, end),
    producing [(1,3),(1,2),(2,1)] instead."""
    result = source.hanoi(2, start=1, end=3)
    assert result == [(1, 2), (1, 3), (2, 3)]
